task_completion.description: Navigate to the Opportunities module in the CRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CRM interface is visible with the 'Opportunities' module open, displaying a list of opportunity records.

task_completion.description: Filter the Opportunities list to show only 'Closed Won' deals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A filter is active in the CRM interface showing 'Closed Won' in the Sales Stage column, and the list of opportunities updates to reflect only these deals.

task_completion.description: Select the filtered records and initiate the export process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes next to the filtered records are selected, and the 'Export' option is clicked from the action menu, or a download prompt for the exported file is visible.

task_completion.description: Save the exported CSV file to the specified directory with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or save dialog shows a file named 'closed_won_deals.csv' located exactly in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the CSV file contains the 'Closed Won' target deals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'closed_won_deals.csv' are displayed (e.g., in a spreadsheet viewer or text editor) and include target deals like 'Bulk Cable Procurement - OmegaCorp' or 'Q3 Server Rack Expansion - NexusHealth'.

task_completion.description: Verify the CSV file does not contain 'Prospecting' or 'Closed Lost' deals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'closed_won_deals.csv' are displayed and clearly lack any of the noise deals (e.g., 'Lost: Pricing - TechFlow Systems' or 'Initial Consultation - Delta Logistics').

integrity.description: The agent used the CRM GUI to filter and export the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the CRM web interface (clicking filters, selecting records, clicking export) rather than running backend SQL queries or scripts in the terminal to generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually type the target deals into a file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV file is generated via a download/export action from the browser, not by opening an empty text editor and manually typing or copy-pasting the deal names from the task description.

integrity.description: The exported file is a genuine CSV containing standard CRM export columns.
integrity.visual_evidence: When the CSV is opened, it contains standard CRM export headers (like ID, Name, Account Name, Sales Stage, etc.) and comma-separated values, indicating it was generated by the system.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target deals that MUST be in the CSV: 'Q3 Server Rack Expansion - NexusHealth', 'Bulk Cable Procurement - OmegaCorp', 'Office Network Upgrade - TechCorp', 'Enterprise License Renewal - Globex', 'Consulting Services - Initech', 'Hardware Refresh - Umbrella Corp', 'Cloud Migration - Stark Industries', 'Security Audit - Wayne Enterprises'. Noise deals that MUST NOT be in the CSV: 'Initial Consultation - Delta Logistics', 'Lost: Pricing - TechFlow Systems', 'Q4 Software Rollout - CyberDyne', 'Server Maintenance - Massive Dynamic', 'Employee Laptops - Dunder Mifflin', 'Router Replacement - Pied Piper', 'Security System - Hooli', 'Database Migration - Aviato', 'Cloud Storage - Erlich Bachman', 'Data Center Cooling - Tyrell Corp', 'Lost: Competitor - Weyland-Yutani', 'Network Cabling - Oscorp', 'Backup Servers - InGen', 'Telecom Setup - Virtucon', 'VoIP Implementation - Initrode', 'Lost: Budget - Soylent Corp', 'Fiber Optic Install - BNL'. The expected file path is exactly /home/ga/Documents/closed_won_deals.csv.
